titleStmt.title: SII 20.47: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 47. (B.K. No. 29 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVARA, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing in front of the Bīradēva temple at Hire Baṇa (suburb).

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 996, Ānanda, Chaitra, śu. Prathamanandīśvara-ashṭami, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1074, March 9, Sunday, f.d.t. ·20.

Records that Mahāsāmanta Jayakēśiyarasa, son of Indrakēśiyarasa of Maṇala family, who was the Rashṭrakūṭaka of Purigeṟe-300 division, visited Permāḍi Basadi at Purigeṟe, made it into a pura at the request of Tribhuvanachaṁdrapaṇḍita, disciple of Gaṇḍavimukta—Bhaṭṭāraka of Mūla-samgha and Baḷātkāra-gaṇa and remitted certain tax-incomes to the same. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Lakshmarasa was then governing the divisions of Purigere-300 and Beḷvola-300.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra svādvādāmōgha lāṁchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jo
naśāsanaṁ . svasti stādastadōpāyai nirastaikāntavaptavē samastasurasaṁstuta jinānāṁ śāsanaṁ śriyai .
jayanti nirjjitāśēṣasarvvadaikāntanītayaḥ . satyavākyādipāssaśvadvidyānandā jinē śvarāḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaśrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaranudāramahēśvaraṁ calake balgaṇḍaṁ śauryyamārttaṇḍaṁ patigēka
dōḍaṁ saṁgrāmagaruḍaṁ manujamāndhātaṁ kīrttivikhyātaṁ gōtramāṇikyaṁ vivēka cāṇākyaṁ paranārīsahō
daraṁ vīravṛkōdaraṁ kōdaṇḍapārtthaṁ saujanyatīrtthaṁ maṇḍaḷikakaṇṭhīravaṁ paracakrabhairavaṁ rāyadaṇḍa
gōpāḷaṁ maleyamaṇḍaḷikamṛgaśārddūḷaṁ śrīmadbuvanaikamalladēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ lakṣmarasar purigeṟe mūnūṟuṁ beḷvolamūnūṟumanteraḍaṟunū
ṟumaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire . v® . nānādvīpadoḷagrimaṁ negaḻda jaṁbūdvīpamā dvīpadoḷ nānākṣē
tradoḷuttamaṁ bharatamā bhūbhāgadoḷ kuntaḷaṁ tānatyūrjjitamalli bhōgijanaramyaṁ beḷvo
laṁ tanmukhasthānaṁ śōbhikumāgaḷuṁ purikara śrīrājadhānyāhvayaṁ . purikarapuravara para
mēśvaranujvaḷakīrtti sagaramārttaṇḍaṁ kēsarikētu rāṣṭrakūṭakavaranā triśatakkamiṁdrakēśi
narēṁdraṁ . tatpurikaraviśayādhipanutpāṭitavairi negaḻda maṇalara bhīmaṁ satpātradānanidhiya
rhatpādābjāḷi yiṁdrakēśinarēṁdra . Ātana piriyarasi guṇānvite pativrate caritravati viśadagu
ṇakhyātavati satyavati dhātrītaḷadoḷ caṁḍikabbeyene pogaḷadarār . Avarggagrasūnu bhāvōdbhava
mūrtti sudhāṁśuviśadakīrtti jayaśrīdēvanamaḷamaṇalakuḷavarakuvaḷayaśītāṁśusagara
mārttaṇḍanripaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ vijayaśrīkāntaṁ maṇa lerā
nvayaprasūtaṁ siṁhalāṁcchanaprasūtaṁ purikarapuravarēśvaraṁ kadanamahēśaraṁ pracaṇḍama
ṇḍaḷāgramaṇḍitadōrddaṇḍaṁ sagaramārttaṇḍaṁ kāminīkāmaṁ maṇalarabhīmaṁ turagarēvantaṁ pa
rabaḷakratāntaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ manneyasiṁga nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ
jayakēśiyarasar purigeṟemūnūṟarkaṁ rāṣṭrakūṭakanāgi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeye . kanda . ©
śrīramaṇige samarajayaśrīramaṇige tārahāraśaśiviśadayaśa śrīramaṇige sakaḷavacaśrī
ramaṇige ramaṇanalte jayakēśinripaṁ . Antenisida jayalakṣmīkāntaṁ duṣṭāśvacayakidānenta
narēvantaṁ vidviṭnripatikritāntaṁ sukhadindamiṟdu jayakēśinripaṁ . © . svasti sakavarśa 996
neyānanda saṁvatsarada caitra suddha prathamanandīśvarada 8 Ādityavāradandu purigeṟege bija
yaṁ geydalliya śrī śaṁkhatīrtthādi jainamaṁdiraṁgaḷaṁ vandanābhaktipūrvvakaṁ nōḍuttaṁ bandu permmā
ḍiya basadige vandalliya mūlasaṁghānvayada baḷātkāragaṇada gaṇḍavimuktabha
ṭṭārakara śiṣyar tribhuvanacandrapaṇḍitadēvaraṁ kaṇḍu trikaraṇasuddhiyiṁ bandisi ku
ḷḷiṟdu . ka . purigeṟeyoḷpermāḍiya puravaramaḷidiṟdudaṁ gajāridhvajanāda
radindame nōḍi punarbbharaṇaṁ māḍalke vēḍi jayakēśinripaṁ . smararūpaṁ permmā ḍiya
puravaradoḷ naḍeva manneyada kiṟudeṟeyaṁ puradānikeyuḷvadīpaṁ parihāraṁ
biṭṭu māḍidaṁ tatpuramaṁ . Alli manneya nibandhada kiṟudeṟegaḷavāvuvendaḍe manevaṇaṁ
piriyaravaṇaṁ dhanabaḷaṁ kāḷagolcu mēṁṭigaṇḍugavaṁgaḍiya tiṁgaḷina bēḷeyondintī naḍe
va teṟegaḷmaṁ poḷalamanneyadānikeyuḷva dīpumaṁ dāyadrammada kiṟudeṟegaḷu
maṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāge biṭṭu naḍeyisida . ka . tiḷidinitu teṟeyumaṁ kāda
ḷipillade negaṟdareyduvarssurapuramaṁ paḷigaḷkadaḷiva pātakariḷivarggaḷagaḷane narakaga
tiganavarataṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā . śaṣṭirvvarṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 20.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
